_INSTRUCTIONS: This file is a usage guide — do NOT add it to manifest.json
_HOW_TO_ADD_A_PRESS_RELEASE: 1. Drop your PDF file into this folder (e.g. PR-001.pdf)
3. Add one entry to the array (see example below)
4. Push to GitHub — the website auto-shows it on every page open

_MANIFEST_ENTRY_FORMAT_PDF.title: Your Press Release Title Here
_MANIFEST_ENTRY_FORMAT_PDF.author: Office of the President
_MANIFEST_ENTRY_FORMAT_PDF.summary: Optional: A one or two sentence summary of this press release.

_MANIFEST_ENTRY_FORMAT_TEXT.title: Your Press Release Title Here
_MANIFEST_ENTRY_FORMAT_TEXT.author: Office of the President
_MANIFEST_ENTRY_FORMAT_TEXT.content:
Full text of your press release goes here.

Blank lines create new paragraphs.
Single line breaks also work.

_NOTE: You can mix PDF and text press releases — both work. Newest date always shows first.
